_README: SOURCE OF TRUTH for ghcr.io/imazen container package NAMES used by the zen fleet/sweep infra. The rule: ONE ghcr package per artifact; variants are TAGS, never new package names. A new package name MAY ONLY be created by adding it to `packages[]` here in the same reviewed change — CI (`just ghcr-check`) fails if any active infra file references a `ghcr.io/imazen/<name>` that is not listed here. See docs/GHCR_PACKAGES.md for the policy, tag conventions, and the migration playbook for the `deprecated` names below.

packages.name: zenmetrics-sweep
packages.purpose: GPU/CPU codec-sweep + metric-score worker (the 'omni' image baking the zenmetrics CLI + all 5 codecs + GPU/CPU metrics). The image fleet boxes pull to encode and score.
packages.builds_from: Dockerfile.sweep.v27 (amd64) / scripts/sweep/Dockerfile.sweep.hetzner.v1 (arm64) — precompiled binary COPY'd in.
tag_convention: v<NN>             — image generation (v26, v27, ...); bump for a layering/base change, NOT a code push
v<NN>-<date>      — pinned immutable build of generation NN
hetzner | salad   — provider-specific variant (arch/entrypoint), e.g. :hetzner is the arm64 CAX build
split             — the encode-once/score-many SPLIT worker variant

packages.name: zenfleet-worker
packages.purpose: Job-system fleet worker: pull-based, claims content-addressed jobs from the R2 lease-queue, runs the ZEN_EXEC executor, writes blobs + ledger rows. Multi-arch (amd64+arm64).
tag_convention: buildcache-amd64 | buildcache-arm64 — buildkit registry cache (not a runnable image)
exec              — worker base + zenmetrics jobexec real executor (CPU)
exec-gpu          — exec variant on a CUDA base for GPU metric scoring

packages.name: pycvvdp-scorer
packages.purpose: pycvvdp (PyTorch) CVVDP reference scorer. Kept a SEPARATE package on purpose: it carries ~3 GB of torch, so it must not bloat the cold-start of the sweep image.
tag_convention: <pycvvdp-version> — e.g. 0.5.4, pinning the upstream pycvvdp release

packages.name: zen-train
packages.purpose: Standalone burn trainer: consumes parquet metric/feature sidecars and bakes ZNPR picker/metric models. Its own cubecl graph; never shares a cargo graph with the GPU-metric crates (see CLAUDE.md 'burn').

deprecated._README: Splinter package names that ALREADY EXIST and are GRANDFATHERED: `just ghcr-check` WARNS (does not fail) when these appear in active infra so the live fleet keeps working, and tolerates them in historical docs. `just ghcr-check --strict` FAILS on any of them in infra — flip to strict once migration is done. Each maps to the canonical `name[:tag]` it should become. Migration playbook: docs/GHCR_PACKAGES.md. The end-state is this map EMPTY.
